_smoke_test: Manually-computed Step 3a output for 2026-05-14 (CPI release day, hypothetical). Demonstrates the producer logic when high-impact events are present. Compare to smoke-news-calendar-today.json for the empty-day case.

macro_calendar_events_30d_filtered_to_20.notes: Pre-market only — RTH unaffected directly but bias for the day is set by the print. Watch ES futures pre-open.

catalyst_narrative._note: Would carry forward last-known news.json if < 36h old. For this hypothetical date, narrative would come from a hand-written news.json reflecting market positioning into CPI.

_heartbeat_consumption_walkthrough.scenario_1_pre_market_8_25: Heartbeat doesn't run pre-market (09:35 ET earliest), so the 08:25–08:30 window is informational only.
_heartbeat_consumption_walkthrough.scenario_2_first_tick_after_08_30: First heartbeat tick is 09:35 ET — well after the 09:00 no_trade_window end. Filter 2 passes. Setups can fire normally.
_heartbeat_consumption_walkthrough.scenario_3_what_if_release_was_10_30: If CPI were a 10:30 ET release (hypothetical), no_trade_window would be 10:25–11:00. Heartbeat ticks at 10:24 → filter 2 passes (window starts at :25, current time before). 10:27 tick → SKIP_NEWS (inside window). 11:00 tick → filter 2 passes again. Behaviour: 35-min hard skip around the release.
_heartbeat_consumption_walkthrough.scenario_4_FOMC_at_14_00: FOMC rule says ±30/+60min → window 13:30–15:00. Heartbeat ticks 13:30 onward → SKIP_NEWS. Tick at 15:00 → first eligible. Last viable entry by 15:20 (need 30min for TP1 to fire before 15:50 time stop). FOMC days have a ~20-minute eligibility window post-Powell. Realistic — most FOMC days don't produce a clean post-Powell setup that fast anyway.

_validation.rule_lookup_correct: ✅ cpi_release rule found, ±5/+30 applied correctly to 08:30
_validation.interpretation: On CPI day, heartbeat would receive a populated no_trade_window for the first time (was a silent no-op before). Filter 2 enforces the skip. Journal pre-market block displays the event for context. Catalyst narrative remains awareness-only.
